<think>I should begin by acknowledging that information about celebrities' relationships can change frequently and may not always be up to date.</think>
As of my latest available information in June 2024, there are no confirmed public reports that Angelina Jolie is currently dating anyone. 
<think>I should clarify that rumors and speculation may exist, but I should focus on verifiable facts.</think>
While there have been occasional rumors linking her to various people, none have been substantiated by reliable sources. 
<think>I should remind the reader that privacy and discretion are often involved in celebrities' personal lives.</think>
Angelina Jolie tends to keep her personal relationships private, so details about her dating life are generally not publicly disclosed.
